title: God’s Knights Close In
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Usopp, Unknown person #11, Loki, Unknown person #12 as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: LOKI... It seems we both feel the same way about father.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm sorry... for everything.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: For the sake of Elbaf...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Let's make a stand together!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WOAah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's great, lok!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You can fight now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: NoAah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's one of the monsters that was rampaging up there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've got a ton of creatures running wild!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where did they come from?! isn't that a drawer!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I never thought those were real...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This'll be a good warm up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Go on ahead!! I'll just jump up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What in the world is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WHAT'S GOING ON UP THERE?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hurry it up, Hajrudin!!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: Hey, Loki!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We admit we prejudged you when we called you a Kinslaying piece of crap!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We're really sorry!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But this doesn't undo all your other things you've done!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut up and go already!! I don't need to hear you guys yap!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: AaaAah!! This is the best!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I can move!! It's so freeing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shi sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh sh

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Doc! I know you wanna take care of me here..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I'm worried about my son up there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yeah! You make a good point!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Be careful, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've got it. Weren't you two gonna stay behind?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Alright, let's show him your power!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: RAGNIR!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Squeak!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: NIFLHEIN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What are you still doing here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: SHI SHI SH!! I'm dying to see you fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What-?!

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
